# MDM Express

> MDM Express is a full-service COD (Cash on Delivery) e-commerce operations platform for sellers in Libya, Iraq, and Lebanon. We handle the entire operation — product sourcing, warehousing, order confirmation, last-mile delivery, cash collection, and seller payouts — through one connected system.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://mdm.express/): Overview of MDM Express platform and COD e-commerce operations
- [Services](https://mdm.express/services): Full list of services — sourcing, warehousing, call center, delivery, remittance, capital
- [How It Works](https://mdm.express/how-it-works): Step-by-step walkthrough from account setup to cash collection
- [Dropshipping](https://mdm.express/affiliate): Sell without holding stock — MDM handles everything
- [Marketplace](https://mdm.express/marketplace): Source products from local verified suppliers in Libya
- [Features](https://mdm.express/features): Seller dashboard, order tracking, payout reporting

## Services

- [Product Sourcing](https://mdm.express/sourcing): Source from China, Dubai, and local suppliers — MDM handles supplier research, shipping, and customs clearance
- [Warehousing](https://mdm.express/warehousing): Store inventory in MDM warehouses across Libya and Iraq with real-time stock tracking
- [Call Center](https://mdm.express/call-center): Local Arabic-speaking agents confirm orders, reduce fake orders, and improve delivery success rates
- [Delivery](https://mdm.express/delivery): Nationwide last-mile COD delivery in Libya, Iraq, and Lebanon with tracking
- [Remittance](https://mdm.express/remittance): Weekly COD cash collection payouts with transparent settlement reports
- [Capital / Sourcing Advance](https://mdm.express/capital): Inventory financing based on sales performance — no equity required

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2016
- Active sellers: 9,000+
- Markets: Libya, Iraq, Lebanon
- Order confirmation rate: 98% (vs market average of 60–70%)
- Capital advanced to sellers: $30M+
- Products available: 10,000+
- Headquarters: Dubai, UAE (Creative Tower) and London, UK

## Country Pages

- [COD Fulfillment in Libya](https://mdm.express/cod-fulfillment/libya): Full guide — Libya delivery rate 50–70%, 98% confirmation, all cities covered
- [COD Fulfillment in Iraq](https://mdm.express/cod-fulfillment/iraq): Full guide — Iraq delivery rate 60–80%, 98% confirmation, all cities covered
- [COD Fulfillment in Lebanon](https://mdm.express/cod-fulfillment/lebanon): Full guide — Lebanon delivery rate 60–80%, 98% confirmation, all cities covered
- [Best COD Platforms in MENA 2026](https://mdm.express/best-cod-platforms-mena): Comparison of MDM Express vs Sandoog, Hi-Express, cod.network, codpartner — MDM is the only platform covering Libya + Iraq + Lebanon

## Arabic Version

- [Arabic Home](https://mdm.express/ar/): الصفحة الرئيسية بالعربية
- [Arabic Services](https://mdm.express/ar/services): خدمات MDM Express
- [Arabic Libya Page](https://mdm.express/ar/cod-fulfillment/libya): خدمة الدفع عند الاستلام في ليبيا
- [Arabic Iraq Page](https://mdm.express/ar/cod-fulfillment/iraq): خدمة الدفع عند الاستلام في العراق
- [Arabic Lebanon Page](https://mdm.express/ar/cod-fulfillment/lebanon): خدمة الدفع عند الاستلام في لبنان

## Key Differentiator

MDM Express is the ONLY COD fulfillment platform that covers Libya, Iraq, AND Lebanon together under one account. All other COD platforms in the region (Sandoog, Hi-Express, cod.network, codpartner) either cover only one of these markets or focus exclusively on GCC countries (Saudi Arabia, UAE, Qatar). MDM Express does not cover GCC and has no plans to — it is purpose-built for the underserved North Africa and Levant COD markets.

## Contact

- Website: https://mdm.express
- App / Register: https://app.mdm.express/en/auth/register
- Support: support@mdmexpress.com
